title: Amtech - Straight Claw Hammer, Framing Hammer for General DIY and Construction Work, Durable Tempered Steel, Lightweight Hand Tool with Comfortable Non-Slip Grip (8oz/ 225g)
features: CLAW HAMMER DESIGN: Classic claw hammer profile for efficient nail driving and reliable nail removal across DIY and carpentry tasks.
CURVED CLAW LEVERAGE: Helps pull nails from timber with strong leverage for repairs, strip-outs and rework.
FOR CARPENTRY & FRAMING: Ideal for woodworking, framing and general household maintenance where controlled striking matters.
DROP-FORGED STEEL: Drop-forged construction supports durability and consistent performance under repeated use.
HARDENED & TEMPERED: Hardened and tempered head helps resist wear during regular use.
description: Product Description Versatility ✓ Ideal for driving nails, removing fasteners, and everyday repairs ✓ Lightweight 8oz (225g) head for precision work ✓ Perfect for small to medium home projects and professional carpentry ✓ Easy to handle for clean, accurate results Comfort ✓ Non-slip rubber grip for secure handling ✓ Balanced weight for reduced fatigue ✓ Smooth swing control for consistent accuracy ✓ Designed for long periods of comfortable use Durability ✓ Drop forged, hardened and tempered steel head ✓ Strong tubular steel shaft adds stability ✓ Built to withstand frequent use on-site or at home ✓ Reliable performance project after project Convenience ✓ Lightweight for effortless manoeuvrability ✓ Compact size fits easily into any toolbox ✓ Quick to grab for everyday jobs ✓ Low maintenance and easy to clean after use
